title: Get a copy of a finding of fact of domestic abuse
body: "If a judge in a non-criminal court decides that domestic abuse has happened, it’s called a finding of fact.  The court should send you a copy of the court order with the finding of fact. To get another copy of the court order, you should:   fill in the sample letter as best you can send it to the court that issued the order    A copy of the order costs £5, but you may be able to get help with the fee.  You can use the evidence to apply for legal aid to divorce or separate from an abusive partner. "
